/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ServicesCompileTest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ServicesCompileTest.dir/services_compile_test.cpp.o -o ServicesCompileTest  ../../Services/AtlasBuildService/libAtlasBuildService.a ../../Services/AtlasAssetService/libAtlasAssetService.a ../../Services/AtlasWorldService/libAtlasWorldService.a ../../Services/AtlasSessionService/libAtlasSessionService.a ../../Services/AtlasTelemetryService/libAtlasTelemetryService.a ../../Atlas/Core/libAtlasCore.a
